# landscapeR

An R package for multi-layer omic state-transition analysis.

Combines **comparative decomposition** (GSVD / HO-GSVD) with
**quasi-potential dynamics** to identify tipping points and
irreversibility in biological state transitions — generalising the
Frankhouser/Rockne AML work to arbitrary multi-omic contexts.

## What it does

1.  **Stage 1 — Comparative decomposition**: builds a shared state space
    across omic layers whose axes explicitly contrast conditions
    (disease vs control, temperature, genotype). Batch effects and
    confounders are separated from biological signal by design.

2.  **Stage 2 — Quasi-potential dynamics**: fits U(x) = −log p(x) on
    those coordinates and reads out critical points (wells, barriers)
    and barrier heights — the tipping points and irreversibility of
    state transitions.

A gallery diagnostic
([`plot_components()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/plot_components.md))
identifies which component carrying the state-transition signal without
requiring prior knowledge of the biology.

## Install

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("drejom/landscapeR")
```

Bioconductor dependencies (`MultiAssayExperiment`, `S4Vectors`) are
resolved automatically via `pak`.

## Quick start

``` r
library(landscapeR)

# Synthetic double-well ground truth
std  <- synthetic_potential_control(n = 80L, seed = 42L)

# Stage 1
ctor  <- get_strategy("Decomposer", "hogsvd_averaged")
std1  <- decompose(ctor(), std)@value
plot_components(std1, colour_by = "group")

# Stage 2
dctor <- get_strategy("DynamicsEstimator", "kde_logdensity")
std2  <- estimate_dynamics(dctor(), std1)@value
plot_potential(std2)
```

## Status

Active development — see the [pkgdown
site](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR) for the current development
log and roadmap.

## Reference

Frankhouser et al. *Cancer Research* 2020 · PMID 32414754  
Frankhouser et al. *Leukemia* 2024 · PMID 38307941

# Package index

## Container

Core data structure

- [`StateTransitionData()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/StateTransitionData.md)
  : Construct a StateTransitionData object
- [`StateTransitionData-class`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/StateTransitionData-class.md)
  : Inter-stage container
- [`validate_boundary()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/validate_boundary.md)
  : Validate a StateTransitionData object at a stage boundary
- [`migrate()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/migrate.md)
  : Migrate a StateTransitionData object to a target schema version

## Stage 0 — Synthetic controls

- [`synthetic_control()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/synthetic_control.md)
  : Generate one synthetic control dataset
- [`control_ladder()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/control_ladder.md)
  : Run the Stage 1 control ladder
- [`synthetic_potential_control()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/synthetic_potential_control.md)
  : Generate a synthetic potential control via Langevin simulation
- [`potential_recovery_benchmark()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/potential_recovery_benchmark.md)
  : Measure Stage 2 quasi-potential recovery on a synthetic potential
  control

## Stage 1 — Decomposition

- [`decompose()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/decompose.md)
  : Decompose multi-layer data into shared and layer-exclusive subspaces

## Stage 2 — Dynamics

- [`estimate_dynamics()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/estimate_dynamics.md)
  : Estimate quasi-potential dynamics on decomposition coordinates

## Projection

- [`project_into()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/project_into.md)
  : Project a secondary cohort into the state-space of a primary cohort

## Plots

- [`plot_spectrum()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/plot_spectrum.md)
  : Plot singular value spectra with the BBP detectability threshold
- [`plot_decomposition()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/plot_decomposition.md)
  : Plot sample coordinates on the recovered state-transition axis
  (Stage 1 output)
- [`plot_components()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/plot_components.md)
  : Gallery plot: all Stage 1 components coloured by a metadata variable
- [`plot_potential()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/plot_potential.md)
  : Plot the quasi-potential landscape (Stage 2 output)

## Registry

- [`register_strategy()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/register_strategy.md)
  : Register an algorithm implementation under a stage contract
- [`get_strategy()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/get_strategy.md)
  : Retrieve an implementation constructor from the registry
- [`list_strategies()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/list_strategies.md)
  : List registered implementations, optionally filtered by contract

## Provenance

- [`record_provenance()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/record_provenance.md)
  : Append a provenance step to a StateTransitionData object
- [`ProvenanceStep-class`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/ProvenanceStep-class.md)
  : Provenance step recorded by each stage

## Pipeline runner

- [`run_pipeline()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/run_pipeline.md)
  : Run the pipeline sequentially (development / testing helper)
- [`setup_rng()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/setup_rng.md)
  : Set up reproducible parallel-safe RNG
- [`PipelineConfig-class`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/PipelineConfig-class.md)
  : Pipeline configuration
- [`StageResult-class`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/StageResult-class.md)
  : Typed result returned by every stage function

## Planned / stub contracts

Contract generics for stages not yet implemented. These are exported so
registered strategies can be tested independently.

- [`assess_fit()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/assess_fit.md)
  : Assess where real data sits in each archetype's null distribution
- [`classify_archetype()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/classify_archetype.md)
  : Classify data into a trajectory archetype
- [`extract_signature()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/extract_signature.md)
  : Extract a descriptor vector from a StateTransitionData object
- [`generate()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/generate.md)
  : Generate synthetic StateTransitionData with embedded ground truth
- [`interpret()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/interpret.md)
  : Map an archetype to named component roles for a specific domain
- [`recovery_benchmark()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/recovery_benchmark.md)
  : Measure Stage 1 subspace recovery on a synthetic control
- [`register_migration()`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/register_migration.md)
  : Register a schema migration function
- [`landscapeR`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/landscapeR-package.md)
  [`landscapeR-package`](https://lab.omeally.com/landscapeR/reference/landscapeR-package.md)
  : landscapeR: Comparative Decomposition and State-Transition Dynamics
